summary.en: Vybe lets anyone in a company build and launch secure internal AI-powered apps from their own data in seconds.
summary.zh: Vybe 讓公司裡的任何人都能在幾秒內，用自家資料打造並上線安全的內部 AI 應用程式。

highlight.en: Founded by repeat YC founders, Vybe is "Lovable for internal apps," shipping pre-built integrations, SSO, and AI tools so vibe-coded apps actually fit enterprise use.
highlight.zh: 由連續創業的 YC 創辦人打造，Vybe 是「內部應用版的 Lovable」，提供現成的整合、SSO 與 AI 工具，讓 vibe coding 做出的應用真正適用於企業場景。

summary.en: GroundControl builds vertical AI software that automates quality documentation for highly-regulated manufacturing.
summary.zh: GroundControl 打造垂直 AI 軟體，為高度受規範的製造業自動化品質文件作業。

highlight.en: Targeting aerospace, defense, and medical makers, GroundControl completes the regulated quality paperwork required for every part, like the 3M+ parts in a Boeing 777, in minutes instead of days.
highlight.zh: 鎖定航太、國防與醫療製造商，GroundControl 將每個零件所需的法規品質文件（例如波音 777 的逾 300 萬個零件）從數天縮短到數分鐘完成。

summary.en: Kaelio builds ktx, an open-source context layer that makes data agents reliable across the whole data stack.
summary.zh: Kaelio 打造開源情境層 ktx，讓資料代理在整個資料堆疊中都能穩定可靠地運作。

highlight.en: Data agents fail because metrics are defined in many places and governed in none; ktx connects warehouse, BI, and docs to auto-build one governed context layer any agent can query.
highlight.zh: 資料代理失敗，是因為指標散落多處卻無人治理；ktx 串接資料倉儲、BI 與文件，自動建立一個受治理的情境層，讓任何代理都能查詢。

summary.en: Refresh builds reinforcement-learning environments for training agents on coding and computer-use work.
summary.zh: Refresh 打造強化學習環境，用於訓練代理執行程式設計與電腦操作工作。

highlight.en: Refresh creates "training gyms"—RL environments that let models practice software engineering and computer-use tasks rather than learning from static data alone.
highlight.zh: Refresh 打造「訓練健身房」，提供強化學習環境，讓模型能實際練習軟體工程與電腦操作任務，而非僅從靜態資料學習。

summary.en: Third Chair is an AI-native IP enforcement agent that helps rightsholders protect and monetize their content.
summary.zh: Third Chair 是 AI 原生的智慧財產權維權代理，協助權利人保護內容並將其變現。

highlight.en: Third Chair gives media companies visibility into who uses their content, turns unauthorized ads into recurring income, and backs it with an on-demand network of top lawyers.
highlight.zh: Third Chair 讓媒體公司掌握誰在使用其內容，將未授權廣告轉化為可預期的收入，並有頂尖律師的隨需網絡作為後盾。

summary.en: Naïve provisions AI agents with verified identity, a spend-limited card, inbox, phone, and tools via one API.
summary.zh: Naïve 透過單一 API 為 AI 代理配置驗證身分、有額度上限的卡片、信箱、電話號碼與各種工具。

highlight.en: Naïve treats agent identity, money, and permissions as code, letting teams provision one agent or a million—each scoped per end-user, with a control layer that audits and can revoke every action.
highlight.zh: Naïve 將代理的身分、金流與權限視為程式碼，讓團隊可配置一個或上百萬個代理，每個都依終端使用者設定範圍，並有可稽核、可撤銷每項行動的控制層。

summary.en: Willow is a Mac AI dictation app that lets you type with your voice across email, docs, and AI prompts.
summary.zh: Willow 是 Mac 上的 AI 聽寫應用，讓你在電子郵件、文件與 AI 提示中用語音輸入文字。

highlight.en: Built to multiply the productivity of heavy email, docs, and AI-prompting users, Willow replaces the keyboard with voice and is currently free on Mac only.
highlight.zh: Willow 旨在大幅提升頻繁處理郵件、文件與 AI 提示者的生產力，以語音取代鍵盤，目前僅限 Mac 且免費使用。

summary.en: Avallon automates insurance claims operations with AI agents that handle routine calls and document processing.
summary.zh: Avallon 以 AI 代理自動化保險理賠作業，處理例行通話與文件流程。

highlight.en: Avallon's AI agents take over the repetitive calls and paperwork that slow insurance claims teams, focusing on routine operational tasks rather than judgment-heavy decisions.
highlight.zh: Avallon 的 AI 代理接手拖慢保險理賠團隊的重複性通話與文書作業，專注於例行操作任務而非需大量判斷的決策。

summary.en: Bluejay lets teams test, monitor, and improve their voice and chat AI agents.
summary.zh: Bluejay 讓團隊測試、監控並改進其語音與聊天 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Positioning itself as the trust layer between businesses and customers, Bluejay aims to engineer reliability into every AI interaction.
highlight.zh: Bluejay 將自己定位為企業與顧客間的信任層，目標是為每一次 AI 互動建立可靠性。

summary.en: Theta builds specialized AI tailored to individual jobs and roles.
summary.zh: Theta 打造針對個別工作與職務量身設計的專用 AI。

highlight.en: Rather than one general assistant, Theta focuses on purpose-built AI for every specific job, tailoring its tools to the demands of each role.
highlight.zh: Theta 不走單一通用助理路線，而是專注於為每項特定工作打造專用 AI，依各職務需求量身設計工具。

summary.en: MorphoAI is an AI-powered platform for engineers to design robots and machines in minutes, not years.
summary.zh: MorphoAI 是 AI 驅動的平台，讓工程師在數分鐘而非數年內設計機器人與機械。

highlight.en: Commercializing 10+ years of Harvard and MIT research, MorphoAI's algorithm formulates and fine-tunes machine designs from hundreds of options based on parts, constraints, and tasks.
highlight.zh: MorphoAI 將哈佛與麻省理工逾十年的研究商業化，其演算法依零件、限制與任務，從數百種選項中構建並微調機械設計。

summary.en: Mesmer is an operating system that helps engineering teams turn AI agents into real, organization-wide leverage.
summary.zh: Mesmer 是一套作業系統，協助工程團隊將 AI 代理轉化為全組織的真正生產力槓桿。

highlight.en: Built by repeat founders who led engineering at the $400M AI advisor Origin Financial, Mesmer gives CTOs faster delivery, better quality, and a clear view of bottlenecks across agentic teams.
highlight.zh: 由曾在 4 億美元 AI 顧問公司 Origin Financial 領導工程的連續創業者打造，Mesmer 讓 CTO 在代理化團隊中獲得更快交付、更佳品質與清楚的瓶頸洞察。

summary.en: Airweave is an open-source context retrieval layer that turns private data sources into searchable knowledge for AI agents.
summary.zh: Airweave 是開源情境檢索層，將私有資料來源轉化為 AI 代理可搜尋的知識庫。

highlight.en: Airweave connects to productivity tools, email, and document stores across workspaces, transforming their contents into searchable knowledge bases that agents can retrieve from.
highlight.zh: Airweave 串接工作空間中的生產力工具、電子郵件與文件儲存庫，將內容轉化為代理可檢索的可搜尋知識庫。

summary.en: Cascade Space is building a commercial alternative to NASA's Deep Space Network.
summary.zh: Cascade Space 正打造 NASA 深空網路的商業替代方案。

highlight.en: Cascade Space's first ground station, Earth Station Zero, is slated to downlink data from the Moon in 2026, scaling toward a full global network by 2028.
highlight.zh: Cascade Space 的首座地面站「Earth Station Zero」預計在 2026 年從月球接收下行資料，並在 2028 年前擴展為完整的全球網路。

summary.en: Claim Health is an AI revenue platform that prevents denials and automates billing for post-acute care.
summary.zh: Claim Health 是 AI 營收平台，為急性後期照護防止理賠拒付並自動化帳務作業。

highlight.en: In a $400B post-acute market that leaks over $20B a year, Claim Health catches denials before they happen and connects every step from referral to cash so agencies scale without adding headcount.
highlight.zh: 在每年滲漏逾 200 億美元的 4,000 億美元急性後期照護市場中，Claim Health 在拒付發生前攔截，並串接從轉介到收款的每一步，讓機構不增人力也能擴張。

summary.en: HelixDB is a fast, scalable graph-vector database built as memory infrastructure for AI agents.
summary.zh: HelixDB 是快速、可擴展的圖向量資料庫，作為 AI 代理的記憶基礎設施。

highlight.en: As AI agents replace traditional software, they need to store, recall, and reason over context; HelixDB combines graph and vector storage in one system to provide that knowledge layer.
highlight.zh: 當 AI 代理取代傳統軟體，它們需要儲存、回想並推理情境；HelixDB 將圖與向量儲存整合於單一系統，提供這層知識基礎。

summary.en: Sim is an open-source platform for technical teams to build and deploy AI agent workflows.
summary.zh: Sim 是開源平台，讓技術團隊建立並部署 AI 代理工作流程。

highlight.en: Sim is used by 70,000+ developers and integrates with 1,000+ apps and LLMs, letting fast-growing teams streamline workflows with AI agents.
highlight.zh: Sim 已有逾 7 萬名開發者使用，並整合逾 1,000 個應用程式與 LLM，讓快速成長的團隊以 AI 代理優化工作流程。

summary.en: Mbodi AI lets you teach industrial robots new skills through natural language and quick demos.
summary.zh: Mbodi AI 讓你透過自然語言與快速示範，教工業機器人學會新技能。

highlight.en: Mbodi combines generative AI and agent orchestration to turn everyday language and short demos into precise, reliable robot actions that run in production within minutes.
highlight.zh: Mbodi 結合生成式 AI 與代理編排，將日常語言與簡短示範轉化為精確可靠的機器人動作，並在數分鐘內投入生產運作。

summary.en: Parsewise provides embeddable multi-document processing and analysis for risk teams, AI agents, and pipelines.
summary.zh: Parsewise 提供可嵌入的多文件處理與分析，服務風險團隊、AI 代理與資料管線。

highlight.en: Ops teams use Parsewise to oversee fleets of AI agents while tech teams use its API and MCP to resolve values across documents and assess casualty, specialty, KYC, and financial risk at scale.
highlight.zh: 營運團隊用 Parsewise 監督 AI 代理群，技術團隊則用其 API 與 MCP 跨文件比對數值，大規模評估意外、特殊、KYC 與財務風險。

summary.en: Kaizen uses browser agents to automate operational work across legacy web portals.
summary.zh: Kaizen 運用瀏覽器代理，自動化跨老舊網頁入口的營運工作。

highlight.en: Kaizen targets the $300B business process outsourcing market by replacing the manual portal work that powers healthcare, logistics, and financial services.
highlight.zh: Kaizen 鎖定 3,000 億美元的業務流程外包市場，取代支撐醫療、物流與金融服務的人工入口作業。

summary.en: Crimson is an AI case-intelligence platform that acts as an associate for complex litigation lawyers.
summary.zh: Crimson 是 AI 案件情報平台，為處理複雜訴訟的律師擔任助理角色。

highlight.en: Crimson helps litigators build a complete picture of each case—every argument, entity, and event in context—and supports analysis, drafting, and case management across the dispute lifecycle.
highlight.zh: Crimson 協助訴訟律師建立每個案件的完整樣貌，將每項論點、實體與事件置於情境中，並在爭議全程支援分析、起草與案件管理。

summary.en: Novoflow builds AI employees that automate medical operations for clinics via a universal EHR bridge.
summary.zh: Novoflow 打造 AI 員工，透過通用 EHR 橋接器為診所自動化醫療營運。

highlight.en: Novoflow's universal bridge into EHR systems lets every workflow from scheduling to billing run on AI; its first product talks to patients to book, reschedule, and recover cancelled appointments.
highlight.zh: Novoflow 通往 EHR 系統的通用橋接器，讓從排程到帳務的每個流程都能以 AI 運作；其首款產品與病患對話，負責預約、改期並挽回取消的看診。

summary.en: Besimple AI builds the data layer for AI, starting with proprietary, annotated conversational audio.
summary.zh: Besimple AI 打造 AI 的資料層，從專有且經標註的對話音訊起步。

highlight.en: Besimple curates millions of hours of diverse conversational audio across languages and accents, using expert annotators for human-level transcription and diarization to push the audio model frontier.
highlight.zh: Besimple 蒐集數百萬小時涵蓋多語言與口音的對話音訊，並由專家標註員提供人類水準的轉錄與語者分離，推進音訊模型前沿。

summary.en: Probo acts as your compliance team, handling requirements, docs, risks, controls, evidence, and audits.
summary.zh: Probo 擔任你的法規遵循團隊，處理需求、文件、風險、控制、佐證與稽核。

highlight.en: Probo sets right-sized compliance requirements (not overkill), manages docs, risks, controls, and evidence, runs the audit, and keeps everything up to date so founders don't lose weeks to it.
highlight.zh: Probo 設定恰到好處（而非過度）的法遵需求，管理文件、風險、控制與佐證，執行稽核並持續更新，讓創辦人不必為此耗費數週。

summary.en: Minerva is an AI-native accounting firm where accountants collaborate with AI agents on financial advisory.
summary.zh: Minerva 是 AI 原生的會計事務所，會計師與 AI 代理協作提供財務顧問服務。

highlight.en: At Minerva, accountants work alongside intelligent agents to close the books in a fraction of the time traditional firms require while delivering advisory services.
highlight.zh: 在 Minerva，會計師與智慧代理協作，以傳統事務所所需時間的一小部分完成結帳，同時提供顧問服務。

summary.en: Zeon Systems automates manual scientific lab work with AI-powered robotic arms controlled by plain English.
summary.zh: Zeon Systems 以自然語言操控的 AI 機械手臂，自動化科學實驗室的人工作業。

highlight.en: Scientists type experiments in plain English and Zeon translates them into code on robotic arms; it detects equipment, adapts to protocols, and already works with labs at Stanford and UCSF.
highlight.zh: 科學家以自然語言輸入實驗，Zeon 將其轉為機械手臂上的程式碼；它能偵測設備、適應實驗流程，並已與史丹佛與加州大學舊金山分校的實驗室合作。

summary.en: Tinfoil makes AI workloads secure and provably private, giving on-prem-level privacy while running in the cloud.
summary.zh: Tinfoil 讓 AI 工作負載安全且可驗證地保密，在雲端運行卻享有近地端部署的隱私。

highlight.en: Built on NVIDIA Hopper and Blackwell confidential-compute GPUs, Tinfoil lets companies prove claims like "we can't see or log your queries," with no privacy-versus-performance trade-off.
highlight.zh: Tinfoil 建構於 NVIDIA Hopper 與 Blackwell 機密運算 GPU 之上，讓企業能證明「我們無法檢視或記錄你的查詢」，且無須在隱私與效能間取捨。

summary.en: Combinely is an AI coworker for accountants that handles tax, audit, and accounting workflows end-to-end.
summary.zh: Combinely 是會計師的 AI 同事，端到端處理稅務、審計與會計工作流程。

highlight.en: Built by an ex-Deloitte and Google team, Combinely's AI coworker behaves like a junior team member, running workflows end-to-end across the firm's existing systems.
highlight.zh: 由前 Deloitte 與 Google 團隊打造，Combinely 的 AI 同事如同初階團隊成員，跨事務所現有系統端到端執行工作流程。

summary.en: Clidey builds WhoDB, an open-source platform that turns scattered data into one model for automated decisions.
summary.zh: Clidey 打造開源平台 WhoDB，將分散的資料整合為單一模型以自動化決策。

highlight.en: Instead of dashboards or ad-hoc queries, WhoDB lets teams declare decisions—what should happen, under what conditions—and evaluates them automatically as data changes, fully auditable in code.
highlight.zh: WhoDB 讓團隊以宣告式方式定義決策（在何種條件下該發生什麼），並隨資料變動自動評估，全程可在程式碼中稽核，無須建立儀表板或臨時查詢。

summary.en: Nomi is a realtime sales copilot that suggests phrases on the spot from your transcribed calls and playbook.
summary.zh: Nomi 是即時銷售副駕，依轉錄的通話與你的劇本，當場提供話術建議。

highlight.en: Nomi crafts on-the-spot phrase suggestions from live transcribed sales calls and a custom playbook that adapts as you grow, and says it lifts closing rates by 12% on average.
highlight.zh: Nomi 依即時轉錄的銷售通話與隨你成長而調整的自訂劇本，當場提供話術建議，並表示平均可提升 12% 的成交率。

summary.en: Eloquent AI is an AI operator that automates complex, regulated financial-services operations with no APIs or engineering.
summary.zh: Eloquent AI 是 AI 操作員，無須 API 或工程即可自動化金融服務中複雜且受規範的作業。

highlight.en: Eloquent AI's operator learns by observing existing workflows and SOPs, securely controlling browser and desktop apps to automate up to 96% of tasks; it reached $500K ARR in four weeks.
highlight.zh: Eloquent AI 的操作員透過觀察既有工作流程與 SOP 學習，安全操控瀏覽器與桌面應用，自動化高達 96% 的任務，並在四週內達成 50 萬美元 ARR。

summary.en: chrt is a logistics platform for time-critical, same-day shipping of urgent items.
summary.zh: chrt 是一個物流平台，專為時效關鍵、當日送達的緊急貨件而設。

highlight.en: chrt serves the $30B time-critical logistics market with apps for shippers, forwarders, and couriers to dispatch, book flights, and track white-glove deliveries like therapeutics and specialized equipment.
highlight.zh: chrt 服務 300 億美元的時效關鍵物流市場，為托運人、貨運代理與快遞員提供調度、訂機位與追蹤白手套配送（如治療藥物與特殊設備）的應用程式。

summary.en: MindFort builds autonomous AI agents that find, exploit, and patch web-app vulnerabilities at scale.
summary.zh: MindFort 打造自主 AI 代理，可大規模發現、利用並修補網頁應用程式漏洞。

highlight.en: Powered by in-house models, MindFort's agents pentest like human testers—understanding targets and coordinating exploits—to bring offensive security to outnumbered teams as AI code outpaces defenders.
highlight.zh: MindFort 的代理由自家模型驅動，如同人類滲透測試員般理解目標並協同利用漏洞，在 AI 程式碼產出超越防禦速度時，為人力不足的團隊提供攻擊性資安。

summary.en: Pelica is an AI-native operating system that unifies data and adds AI copilots for value-based care teams.
summary.zh: Pelica 是 AI 原生作業系統，為價值導向照護團隊整合資料並提供 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Pelica unifies claims, EHR, pharmacy, lab, and ADT data into one live record, with copilots that do the work—engaging members for preventative care and prepping provider reps before visits.
highlight.zh: Pelica 將理賠、EHR、藥局、檢驗與 ADT 資料整合為單一即時紀錄，其副駕直接執行工作：以多管道聯繫成員做預防照護，並在拜訪前為醫護代表做好準備。

summary.en: Lumari is an AI procurement automation platform that deploys always-on agents for direct materials and supply chain.
summary.zh: Lumari 是 AI 採購自動化平台，部署全天候代理處理直接物料與供應鏈執行。

highlight.en: Founded by engineers from Google, Tesla, Amazon, and Stripe, Lumari runs hundreds of AI agents that source, manage RFQs, expedite POs, and chase quotes on top of existing ERPs—no rip-and-replace.
highlight.zh: 由 Google、Tesla、Amazon 與 Stripe 工程師創立，Lumari 在既有 ERP 之上運行數百個 AI 代理，負責尋源、管理 RFQ、加速採購單與追蹤報價，無須汰換系統。

summary.en: Aravolta is single-pane-of-glass software to monitor, control, and optimize data centers.
summary.zh: Aravolta 是單一檢視介面的軟體，用於監控、控制並最佳化資料中心。

highlight.en: Aravolta's utility node onboards every asset within an hour to detect hardware failures and hotspots, while reporting metrics like Power Usage Effectiveness, energy metering, and resource utilization.
highlight.zh: Aravolta 的公用節點可在一小時內納管所有資產，偵測硬體故障與熱點，並回報電力使用效率（PUE）、能源計量與資源利用率等指標。

summary.en: Better Auth is a comprehensive authentication framework for TypeScript that runs on your own database and backend.
summary.zh: Better Auth 是完整的 TypeScript 驗證框架，可在你自己的資料庫與後端上運行。

highlight.en: Beyond the developer-loved framework, Better Auth adds an infrastructure layer for user management, analytics, bot and fraud detection, transactional email/SMS, and global session storage.
highlight.zh: 除了深受開發者喜愛的框架外，Better Auth 還提供基礎設施層，涵蓋使用者管理、分析、機器人與詐欺偵測、交易型 email/SMS 及全球工作階段儲存。

summary.en: Freesolo encodes a company's user-trajectory knowledge into specialized models that beat state-of-the-art at lower cost.
summary.zh: Freesolo 將企業的使用者軌跡知識編碼為專用模型，以更低成本超越業界頂尖水準。

highlight.en: Freesolo builds "product-native models" by capturing user-trajectory knowledge from a company's product, producing specialized models that outperform the state of the art at far lower latency and cost.
highlight.zh: Freesolo 打造「產品原生模型」，擷取企業產品中的使用者軌跡知識，產出在延遲與成本上大幅更低、卻能超越業界頂尖的專用模型。

summary.en: Photonium builds software to automate optical system design, supercharging optics experts with intelligent tooling.
summary.zh: Photonium 打造軟體以自動化光學系統設計，用智慧工具強化光學專家的能力。

highlight.en: Photonium handles the full optical design stack—optimization, verification, sourcing, and prototyping—for AR/VR, quantum, biotech, metrology, chip fab, and LiDAR applications.
highlight.zh: Photonium 處理完整的光學設計堆疊，從最佳化、驗證、尋源到原型製作，服務 AR/VR、量子、生技、計量、晶片製造與光達等應用。

summary.en: Lyra is an AI-native meeting platform that brings meetings and work together in one clean workspace.
summary.zh: Lyra 是 AI 原生的會議平台，將會議與工作整合進一個清爽的工作空間。

highlight.en: Without screensharing or notetaker clutter, Lyra lets teams edit docs with AI live, create follow-ups as they talk, and ask questions about a call afterward—all with full context across meetings.
highlight.zh: Lyra 無須螢幕分享或筆記機器人干擾，讓團隊與 AI 即時協作文件、邊談邊建立後續事項，並在會後對通話內容提問，跨會議皆保有完整情境。

summary.en: Adentris is a real-time AI compliance copilot that finds and fixes medical documentation errors for hospitals and clinics.
summary.zh: Adentris 是即時 AI 法遵副駕，為醫院與診所找出並修正醫療文件錯誤。

highlight.en: Adentris is "like Grammarly for doctors," catching documentation mistakes that lead to denied insurance claims or patient lawsuits in an industry that spends $40B doing this manually.
highlight.zh: Adentris 如同「醫師版的 Grammarly」，在這個每年花 400 億美元人工處理的產業中，攔截會導致保險拒付或病患訴訟的文件錯誤。

summary.en: Rimba streamlines the journey from data capture to report creation for heavy industries.
summary.zh: Rimba 為重工業簡化從資料擷取到報告產出的整個流程。

highlight.en: Rimba bridges siloed legacy systems—ERPs, SCADA, SharePoint, email, IoT, and telemetry—to automate workflows and reporting for renewables, oil & gas, supply chain, and chemicals.
highlight.zh: Rimba 串接孤立的老舊系統（ERP、SCADA、SharePoint、電子郵件、IoT 與遙測），為再生能源、油氣、供應鏈與化工自動化工作流程與報告。

summary.en: Moby Analytics is an AI agentic platform built for financial auditors to automate audit workflows.
summary.zh: Moby Analytics 是專為財務審計師打造的 AI 代理平台，用於自動化審計工作流程。

highlight.en: Moby lets auditors create and deploy AI agents to automate audit workflows with no code—just prompts and domain expertise.
highlight.zh: Moby 讓審計師無須寫程式，僅以提示與領域專業即可建立並部署 AI 代理，自動化審計工作流程。

summary.en: Cotool is an agentic security platform that eliminates manual, repetitive work for security operations teams.
summary.zh: Cotool 是代理化資安平台，消除資安營運團隊的人工與重複性工作。

highlight.en: Cotool gives security teams an AI co-pilot that assembles context across tools, a no-code agent builder that turns successful investigations into reusable automations, and instant report generation.
highlight.zh: Cotool 為資安團隊提供能跨工具彙整情境的 AI 副駕、可將成功調查轉為可重複使用自動化的無程式碼代理建構器，以及即時報告產生功能。

summary.en: Text.ai builds Alfi, a group chat with social skills that reads the room and helps friends plan together.
summary.zh: Text.ai 打造具社交能力的群組聊天 Alfi，能讀懂氣氛並協助朋友一起安排計畫。

highlight.en: Alfi understands each person in a group chat: it books restaurants with Yelp built in, offers multiplayer image generation, manages a shared social calendar, and remembers everyone's preferences.
highlight.zh: Alfi 理解群組聊天中的每個人：內建 Yelp 訂餐廳、提供多人協作的圖像生成、管理共享的社交行事曆，並記住每個人的偏好。

summary.en: Theorem trains models that make program verification up to 10,000 times faster.
summary.zh: Theorem 訓練模型，讓程式驗證最高加速一萬倍。

highlight.en: Using verification as a feedback loop, Theorem's models have found zero-days in GPU code and cryptography and sped up legacy code migration for teams that need code to be correct and secure.
highlight.zh: Theorem 以驗證作為回饋迴路，其模型已在 GPU 程式碼與密碼學中發現零時差漏洞，並為需要程式正確且安全的團隊加速老舊程式碼遷移。

summary.en: Foundation Industries supplies hard-tech companies with critical components via low-volume, high-mix manufacturing.
summary.zh: Foundation Industries 以小量多樣的製造方式，為硬科技公司供應關鍵零組件。

highlight.en: Foundation Industries rebuilds America's productive edge with fast, flexible domestic production, helping hard-tech teams prototype faster, launch sooner, and ship more hardware at home.
highlight.zh: Foundation Industries 以快速、靈活的國內生產重建美國的製造優勢，協助硬科技團隊更快做原型、更早上市，並在本土生產更多硬體。

summary.en: Leeroo is an AI that continuously learns your organization's knowledge and ships data and AI programs on your stack.
summary.zh: Leeroo 是持續學習組織知識的 AI，並在你的技術堆疊上交付資料與 AI 方案。

highlight.en: Leeroo learns expert playbooks, runs experimentation, and—with human approval—ships data and AI programs along with their operational UIs directly onto a company's existing stack.
highlight.zh: Leeroo 學習專家劇本、進行實驗，並在獲人工核准後，將資料與 AI 方案連同其操作介面，直接交付到公司既有的技術堆疊上。

summary.en: Atum Works is building gigascale nanomanufacturing.
summary.zh: Atum Works 正在打造十億級規模的奈米製造。

highlight.en: Atum Works focuses on manufacturing at the nanoscale at gigascale volumes, aiming to make nano-precision fabrication viable at industrial production levels.
highlight.zh: Atum Works 專注於以十億級產量進行奈米尺度製造，目標是讓奈米精度的製程在工業生產規模上可行。

summary.en: cubic is an AI-powered code review platform that helps developers merge pull requests 28% faster.
summary.zh: cubic 是 AI 驅動的程式碼審查平台，協助開發者將合併 PR 的速度提升 28%。

highlight.en: cubic auto-reviews PRs by learning your codebase's patterns to flag bugs and suggest fixes, then optimizes human review by ordering file changes logically and generating architecture diagrams.
highlight.zh: cubic 透過學習你程式庫的模式自動審查 PR，標示錯誤並建議修正，再以邏輯順序排列檔案變更並產生架構圖，最佳化人工審查。

summary.en: Cua gives every AI agent a cloud desktop, built for Claude Code, Codex, and computer-use agents.
summary.zh: Cua 為每個 AI 代理提供雲端桌面，專為 Claude Code、Codex 等電腦操作代理打造。

highlight.en: Cua provisions cloud desktops for AI agents, providing the virtual computer environment that computer-use agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw need to operate.
highlight.zh: Cua 為 AI 代理配置雲端桌面，提供 Claude Code、Codex 與 OpenClaw 等電腦操作代理運作所需的虛擬電腦環境。

summary.en: Acolite is an AI-native commercial insurance brokerage purpose-built for the construction industry.
summary.zh: Acolite 是 AI 原生的商業保險經紀公司，專為營建業打造。

highlight.en: Acolite pairs modern technology with licensed brokers to help contractors get the right coverage faster and at better rates than traditional brokerages can offer.
highlight.zh: Acolite 結合現代技術與持照經紀人，協助承包商比傳統經紀商更快、以更優費率取得合適的保險。

summary.en: Almond builds Axol, a dual-arm robot designed for real-world tasks using physical AI.
summary.zh: Almond 打造 Axol，一款運用實體 AI 執行真實世界任務的雙臂機器人。

highlight.en: Almond builds robots for physical AI, with its dual-arm robot Axol designed to handle real-world tasks.
highlight.zh: Almond 為實體 AI 打造機器人，其雙臂機器人 Axol 專為處理真實世界的任務而設計。

summary.en: Beluga is a fully managed influencer marketing service that drives real, attributable results at scale.
summary.zh: Beluga 是全代管的網紅行銷服務，能大規模帶來真實且可歸因的成效。

highlight.en: Drawing on 6+ years of influencer marketing experience, Beluga runs companies' influencer campaigns at scale as a fully managed solution focused on attributable results.
highlight.zh: Beluga 憑藉逾六年的網紅行銷經驗，以全代管方案大規模執行企業的網紅行銷活動，專注於可歸因的成效。

summary.en: YouLearn is an AI tutor for college students that turns learning materials into notes, a chat tutor, and tests.
summary.zh: YouLearn 是為大學生打造的 AI 家教，將學習教材轉化為筆記、可對話的家教與測驗。

highlight.en: YouLearn personalizes studying by turning each student's materials into concise notes, an AI tutor they can talk to, and personalized tests.
highlight.zh: YouLearn 將每位學生的教材轉化為精簡筆記、可對話的 AI 家教與個人化測驗，讓學習更貼合個人需求。

summary.en: Percival is an AI copilot that helps researchers analyze and transform real-world data faster.
summary.zh: Percival 是 AI 副駕，協助研究人員更快地分析並轉換真實世界資料。

highlight.en: Percival accelerates data analysis for research, acting as an AI copilot that lets researchers analyze and transform real-world data.
highlight.zh: Percival 加速研究的資料分析，作為 AI 副駕，讓研究人員能分析並轉換真實世界資料。

summary.en: Caucus was an AI CRM built for government to streamline public servants' daily work.
summary.zh: Caucus 是為政府打造的 AI CRM，用以簡化公務員的日常工作。

highlight.en: Caucus aimed to be the one piece of software the American government would need, helping public servants eliminate fragmentation and focus on high-impact work; the company has since shut down.
highlight.zh: Caucus 旨在成為美國政府唯一需要的軟體，協助公務員消除作業分散並專注於高影響力工作；該公司目前已停止營運。

summary.en: PgDog is a scaling engine that shards PostgreSQL automatically without changing app code or schema.
summary.zh: PgDog 是 PostgreSQL 的擴展引擎，無須修改應用程式碼或結構即可自動分片。

highlight.en: Built from sharding Postgres at Instacart in 2020, PgDog understands SQL to distribute queries across databases and also serves as a load balancer and pooler, replacing PgBouncer and RDS Proxy.
highlight.zh: PgDog 源自 2020 年在 Instacart 為 Postgres 分片的經驗，能理解 SQL 並跨資料庫分配查詢，同時兼任負載平衡器與連線池，可取代 PgBouncer 與 RDS Proxy。

summary.en: Attune makes blazingly fast build tools that require zero migration effort.
summary.zh: Attune 打造極速的建置工具，且完全不需要遷移工作。

highlight.en: Unlike Bazel or bigger servers, Attune does native integrations into compilers and build systems—change `cargo build` to `hurry cargo build` for up to 20x faster builds with no new tool to adopt.
highlight.zh: 與 Bazel 或加大伺服器不同，Attune 原生整合進編譯器與建置系統，只需將 `cargo build` 改為 `hurry cargo build`，即可在不導入新工具下達成最高 20 倍的建置速度。

summary.en: Kestral automates the product development lifecycle by surfacing what customers want most and prioritizing it.
summary.zh: Kestral 自動化產品開發週期，找出顧客最想要的功能並排定優先順序。

highlight.en: Built by ex-Asana AI leaders, Kestral bridges the gap between siloed sales/CS customer insights and R&D roadmaps so teams build the highest-leverage work in the $50B work management market.
highlight.zh: 由前 Asana 的 AI 負責人打造，Kestral 銜接孤立於業務／客服的顧客洞察與研發路線圖，讓團隊在 500 億美元的工作管理市場中投入最高槓桿的工作。

summary.en: The LLM Data Company trains frontier models for data-scarce, critical verticals.
summary.zh: The LLM Data Company 為資料稀缺的關鍵垂直領域訓練前沿模型。

highlight.en: The LLM Data Company focuses on building frontier models specifically for critical domains where training data is scarce.
highlight.zh: The LLM Data Company 專注於為訓練資料稀缺的關鍵領域，打造專屬的前沿模型。

summary.en: Jeevy Fabrication is an AI-driven contractor that matches complex weld jobs to the best-fit fabrication shops.
summary.zh: Jeevy Fabrication 是 AI 驅動的承包商，將複雜的焊接工程媒合給最合適的加工廠。

highlight.en: Jeevy's software cuts bid and scheduling time for in-network shops by over 80%, converting manufacturing drawings into accurate bills of materials and resource-loaded schedules to eliminate rework.
highlight.zh: Jeevy 的軟體將網內加工廠的投標與排程時間縮短逾 80%，將製造圖轉換為精確的物料清單與資源負載排程，以消除重工。

summary.en: Prism is the easiest way to build and deploy a production AI agent with a single API call.
summary.zh: Prism 是建立並部署正式環境 AI 代理最簡單的方式，只需單一 API 呼叫。

highlight.en: Prism ends harness-engineering: bring your system prompt, tools, MCP, and skills, and get infrastructure, orchestration, memory, and self-learning out of the box.
highlight.zh: Prism 終結繁瑣的框架工程：帶上你的系統提示、工具、MCP 與技能，即可開箱獲得基礎設施、編排、記憶與自我學習。

summary.en: Human Behavior uses vision models to watch user web sessions so you know exactly how people use your product.
summary.zh: Human Behavior 運用視覺模型觀察使用者的網頁工作階段，讓你精準掌握人們如何使用你的產品。

highlight.en: Going beyond the numbers, Human Behavior applies vision models to every user web session to reveal exactly how people interact with each part of a product.
highlight.zh: Human Behavior 超越數字，將視覺模型應用於每一次使用者的網頁工作階段，精確揭示人們如何與產品的各個部分互動。

summary.en: Klavis AI supplies frontier AI labs with high-quality coding and agentic tool-use data.
summary.zh: Klavis AI 為前沿 AI 實驗室提供高品質的程式設計與代理工具使用資料。

highlight.en: Klavis AI powers frontier AI labs with complex, long-horizon agentic tool-use data for training capable coding and agentic models.
highlight.zh: Klavis AI 以複雜、長時程的代理工具使用資料，支援前沿 AI 實驗室訓練具備程式設計與代理能力的模型。

summary.en: Vassar Robotics builds an open-source semi-humanoid dev kit for homes, aiming to give families back 20 hours a week.
summary.zh: Vassar Robotics 打造開源的半人形居家開發套件，目標是為家庭每週省回 20 小時。

highlight.en: Vassar takes the practical path to home humanoids: an open, mass-produced developer kit powering a real-home teleoperation data flywheel toward autonomy.
highlight.zh: Vassar 以務實路線打造居家人形機器人：一套開源、量產的開發套件，驅動真實家庭中的遠端操作資料飛輪，邁向自主化。

summary.en: Scalar Field is building an agentic trading desk where AI agents research, test, and execute in markets.
summary.zh: Scalar Field 正打造代理化交易台，讓 AI 代理在市場中研究、測試並執行交易。

highlight.en: Founded by an ex-Tower Research and Goldman Sachs trader and an ex-Microsoft engineering lead, Scalar Field bets agents will soon monitor news, parse filings, rebalance portfolios, and execute trades.
highlight.zh: 由前 Tower Research 與高盛交易員及前微軟工程負責人創立，Scalar Field 押注代理很快將能監看新聞、解析財報、再平衡投資組合並執行交易。

summary.en: Orchid is an AI executive assistant that lives in iMessage, texting your day, drafting replies, and booking meetings.
summary.zh: Orchid 是住在 iMessage 裡的 AI 行政助理，傳訊息提醒你的行程、代擬回覆並安排會議。

highlight.en: Orchid texts you your day each morning, drafts your replies, and books your meetings—you approve and it handles the rest, all inside iMessage.
highlight.zh: Orchid 每天早上傳訊息告訴你當日行程、代擬回覆並安排會議，你只需核准，其餘交由它處理，全部在 iMessage 內完成。

summary.en: Hemut is an AI-powered operating system that automates back-office operations for trucking companies.
summary.zh: Hemut 是 AI 驅動的作業系統，為貨運公司自動化後勤營運。

highlight.en: Hemut's next-gen truck management software adds AI agents for inbound/outbound calls, AI document upload to cut manual data entry, load sourcing tools, and automated accounting.
highlight.zh: Hemut 的新世代卡車管理軟體加入處理進出電話的 AI 代理、減少人工輸入的 AI 文件上傳、貨源搜尋工具與自動化會計。

summary.en: Nimbic AI automatically writes and updates internal documentation with every code commit.
summary.zh: Nimbic AI 在每次程式碼提交時，自動撰寫並更新內部文件。

highlight.en: Nimbic AI keeps internal docs in sync with the codebase by automatically writing and updating them on every commit, removing the manual lag of stale documentation.
highlight.zh: Nimbic AI 透過在每次提交時自動撰寫與更新，讓內部文件與程式庫保持同步，消除文件過時的人工延遲。

summary.en: Code Four uses AI automation to cut the administrative burden on law enforcement officers.
summary.zh: Code Four 運用 AI 自動化，減輕執法人員的行政負擔。

highlight.en: Officers spend up to a third of shifts transcribing body-camera footage; Code Four integrates with body cameras, RMS, and digital evidence systems as a data-processing layer to eliminate that work.
highlight.zh: 員警高達三分之一的勤務時間花在轉錄密錄器影像；Code Four 整合密錄器、記錄管理系統與數位證據系統，作為資料處理層消除這項作業。

summary.en: Wavedash uses cutting-edge browser technology to let gamers play the latest releases with no downloads.
summary.zh: Wavedash 運用尖端瀏覽器技術，讓玩家無須下載即可遊玩最新發行的遊戲。

highlight.en: Wavedash brings the newest game releases straight to the browser, eliminating downloads and installation so players can jump in instantly.
highlight.zh: Wavedash 將最新發行的遊戲直接帶進瀏覽器，免去下載與安裝，讓玩家能立即開玩。

summary.en: Bond is an AI Chief of Staff that gives executives real-time visibility into the company and what to focus on.
summary.zh: Bond 是 AI 幕僚長，讓主管即時掌握公司動態並知道該專注什麼。

highlight.en: Bond gives CEOs and busy executives real-time visibility into what's happening across the company and tells them what to focus on, saving them 10+ hours a week.
highlight.zh: Bond 讓執行長與忙碌的主管即時掌握公司各處的狀況並指出該專注的重點，每週為他們節省超過 10 小時。

summary.en: Aegis is an AI platform that automates insurance denial appeals to help healthcare providers recover lost revenue.
summary.zh: Aegis 是 AI 平台，自動化保險拒付申訴，協助醫療院所追回流失的營收。

highlight.en: Built for billing teams, providers, and hospitals, Aegis uses AI agents to handle denied health insurance claims end-to-end, from intake to resolution.
highlight.zh: Aegis 專為帳務團隊、醫療院所與醫院打造，以 AI 代理端到端處理遭拒的健康保險理賠，涵蓋從受理到結案的全程。

summary.en: Aviro builds reinforcement-learning environments for long-horizon tool use across research, web, and enterprise work.
summary.zh: Aviro 打造強化學習環境，用於研究、網頁與企業工作中的長時程工具使用。

highlight.en: Aviro partners with frontier labs and Fortune 100 companies to build RL environments that train models as high-stakes operators across ML research, the live web, and enterprise knowledge work.
highlight.zh: Aviro 與前沿實驗室及財星百大企業合作，打造強化學習環境，將模型訓練為跨機器學習研究、即時網頁與企業知識工作的高風險操作員。

summary.en: Waffle lets you discover ready-made AI chatbots or build your own with no code, for fun, work, and life.
summary.zh: Waffle 讓你探索現成的 AI 聊天機器人，或無須寫程式打造自己的，用於娛樂、工作與生活。

highlight.en: Waffle offers a marketplace of custom AI chatbots to start chatting with right away, plus a no-code builder for creating your own.
highlight.zh: Waffle 提供可立即開聊的自訂 AI 聊天機器人市集，並附帶可建立自有機器人的無程式碼工具。

summary.en: Atlog creates voice AI agents with built-in compliance so companies can automate calls without legal risk.
summary.zh: Atlog 打造內建法遵的語音 AI 代理，讓公司自動化通話而不必擔心法律風險。

highlight.en: Atlog's tagline is "Voice AI that won't get you sued"—it builds voice agents with compliance baked in so companies can automate calls and texts without worrying about lawsuits.
highlight.zh: Atlog 的標語是「不會害你被告的語音 AI」，它打造內建法遵的語音代理，讓公司自動化通話與簡訊時不必擔心訴訟。

summary.en: Chestnut is an AI mortgage lender that automates 99% of human work with AI agents, saving customers 0.5%+ in interest.
summary.zh: Chestnut 是 AI 房貸放款機構，以 AI 代理自動化 99% 的人工作業，為客戶省下逾 0.5% 的利息。

highlight.en: This is the founder's second mortgage startup—the first processes 2% of US mortgages annually; Chestnut is licensed in Texas and Colorado, powering purchases, refinances, and cash-outs.
highlight.zh: 這是創辦人的第二家房貸新創，其首家公司每年處理全美 2% 的房貸；Chestnut 已在德州與科羅拉多州取得執照，提供購屋、再融資與套現貸款。

summary.en: Frekil accelerates real-world evidence generation for life sciences from months to minutes on a company's own clinical data.
summary.zh: Frekil 在企業自有的臨床資料上，將生命科學的真實世界證據產出從數月縮短到數分鐘。

highlight.en: Frekil connects fragmented clinical data like EHR and claims, letting teams run end-to-end studies—from design and cohort extraction to statistical analysis and reports—with full auditability.
highlight.zh: Frekil 串接 EHR 與理賠等分散的臨床資料，讓團隊端到端執行研究，從研究設計、世代擷取到統計分析與報告，全程可稽核。

summary.en: Plexe is an open-source agent that builds predictive ML models from a plain-language problem description.
summary.zh: Plexe 是開源代理，能依自然語言的問題描述建立預測式機器學習模型。

highlight.en: Plexe connects to data sources, conducts experiments, evaluates models, and deploys them to an API endpoint—all from a problem description, with no manual model building.
highlight.zh: Plexe 串接資料來源、進行實驗、評估模型並部署到 API 端點，這一切僅需問題描述，無須人工建模。

summary.en: Kashikoi is a simulation engine that benchmarks AI agents through autonomous behavioral assessments.
summary.zh: Kashikoi 是模擬引擎，透過自主的行為評估來基準測試 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Kashikoi generates CPU-friendly world models that autonomously interview agents and produce deep behavioral assessments, drawing on technology its team built at Moveworks to ship 250+ enterprise agents.
highlight.zh: Kashikoi 產生對 CPU 友善的世界模型，自主地「面試」代理並產出深入的行為評估，技術源自其團隊在 Moveworks 用以交付逾 250 個企業代理的經驗。

summary.en: nao Labs is an open-source framework to build and deploy analytics agents on your data.
summary.zh: nao Labs 是開源框架，用於在你的資料上建立並部署分析代理。

highlight.en: With nao's CLI you set an analytics agent's context—data, metadata, modeling, and rules—then deploy a UI so anyone can chat with the agent and run analytics on the data.
highlight.zh: 透過 nao 的 CLI，你可設定分析代理的情境（資料、中繼資料、建模與規則），再部署介面讓任何人都能與代理對話並對資料執行分析。

summary.en: BitBoard is an agent-first workbook that lets AI agents build dashboards, reports, SQL, and charts you can share.
summary.zh: BitBoard 是以代理為先的工作簿，讓 AI 代理建立可分享的儀表板、報告、SQL 與圖表。

highlight.en: Connect your agent of choice to BitBoard and it generates connected charts, SQL, code, and commentary in a notebook-style UI built for recurring reports and team collaboration.
highlight.zh: 將你選用的代理連上 BitBoard，它便能在筆記本式介面中產生連動圖表、SQL、程式碼與註解，專為週期性報告與團隊協作而設計。

summary.en: Bloom lets you vibe-code cross-platform mobile apps and test them natively on your phone in seconds.
summary.zh: Bloom 讓你 vibe coding 跨平台行動應用，並在數秒內於手機上原生測試。

highlight.en: Unlike other vibe-code tools, Bloom deploys a backend for you, so you can build functional MVPs and personal apps rather than just toy prototypes.
highlight.zh: 與其他 vibe coding 工具不同，Bloom 會為你部署後端，讓你能打造可運作的 MVP 與個人應用，而非僅是玩具原型。

summary.en: Kanava AI built voice-based sales agents acting as junior reps for wholesale distributors.
summary.zh: Kanava AI 打造語音銷售代理，為批發經銷商擔任初階業務代表。

highlight.en: Kanava's agents handled routine inbound calls, stock and price checks, and CRM updates using live ERP data, aiming to scale sales without added headcount; the company has since shut down.
highlight.zh: Kanava 的代理運用即時 ERP 資料處理例行進線電話、庫存與報價查詢及 CRM 更新，旨在不增人力下擴大銷售；該公司目前已停止營運。

summary.en: Galen AI is a personal healthcare agent that unifies medical records and wearable data into one space.
summary.zh: Galen AI 是個人健康照護代理，將病歷與穿戴裝置資料整合於單一空間。

highlight.en: Galen lets patients securely connect records from 800+ institutions across the US, UK, and Canada plus 20+ wearables like Apple Watch and Dexcom; the company has been acquired.
highlight.zh: Galen 讓病患安全連結來自美、英、加逾 800 家機構的病歷，以及 Apple Watch、Dexcom 等逾 20 種穿戴裝置；該公司已被收購。

summary.en: Ralo is an AI-native mortgage broker that uses AI to cut overhead and pass savings back to borrowers.
summary.zh: Ralo 是 AI 原生的房貸經紀商，運用 AI 削減管理成本並將節省回饋給借款人。

highlight.en: Ralo removes layers of overhead with AI, giving customers rates more than half a point below the national average and saving them tens of thousands over the life of their loan.
highlight.zh: Ralo 以 AI 削減層層管理成本，讓客戶取得比全國平均低逾半個百分點的利率，在貸款存續期間省下數萬美元。

summary.en: Capacitive is a data gateway that supercharges AI agents with secure, permissioned product and team context.
summary.zh: Capacitive 是資料閘道，以安全且受權限控管的產品與團隊情境強化 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Connect Capacitive once to where your internal data lives, then create secure data gateways for agents like Cursor and AgentKit with granular cross-platform permissions, monitoring, and security filtering.
highlight.zh: 將 Capacitive 一次連結到你內部資料所在處，即可為 Cursor、AgentKit 等代理建立安全的資料閘道，具備細緻的跨平台權限、監控與安全過濾。

summary.en: Chonkie builds deep research agents that surface non-obvious signals from scattered public and private data.
summary.zh: Chonkie 打造深度研究代理，從分散的公開與私有資料中挖掘不明顯的訊號。

highlight.en: Chonkie's continuously updated research agents combine public and private sources; its open-source chunking library handles 100K downloads a day and is used by OpenAI, Microsoft, and LlamaIndex.
highlight.zh: Chonkie 持續更新的研究代理結合公開與私有來源；其開源切塊函式庫每天有 10 萬次下載，並獲 OpenAI、Microsoft 與 LlamaIndex 採用。

summary.en: Clarm lets non-technical teams in regulated industries build their own fully governed AI agents with no code.
summary.zh: Clarm 讓受規範產業的非技術團隊，無須寫程式即可打造完全受治理的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Built for banks, healthcare, and insurance, Clarm Atlas lets operators build agents on approved data where every answer cites its source, primitives are deterministic, and every action is logged for audit.
highlight.zh: Clarm Atlas 專為銀行、醫療與保險打造，讓操作人員在核准的資料上建立代理，每個回答皆標註來源、各項基元具確定性，且每項行動皆有稽核紀錄。
